input_preview:
user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["NVIDIA results support continued AI data-center infrastructure demand.", "Micron results support strong AI/data-center memory demand.", "Roundhill Memory ETF packages exposure to global memory companies and began trading in April 2026.", "SEC investor resources warn investors not to make investment decisions based solely on social-media stock recommendations."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: not_supported_as_forward_return_claim
source: https://x.com/nini_incrypto_/status/2066046438094844246

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: Roundhill launched DRAM as a pure memory ETF in April 2026, bundling memory names such as Micron, SK hynix, Samsung, SanDisk, Western Digital, and Seagate; social posts also cite large YTD gains.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Roundhill states DRAM began trading on April 2, 2026 and is a memory-focused ETF.", "Roundhill lists memory-related holdings including SK hynix and SanDisk on the DRAM ETF page.", "MarketWatch describes the Roundhill Memory ETF as recently launched and notes rapid gains and volatility in the memory-chip sector."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: supports_core_claim_but_not_ytd_return
source: https://x.com/Leooo2099/status/2066864625820528988

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["TSMC describes CoWoS-S as packaging for ultra-high-performance computing, AI, and supercomputing with HBM cubes and large interposers.", "TSMC annual-report material says it is developing CoWoS, InFO, SoIC, and COUPE to enable large-scale interconnectivity at lower power.", "Intel says glass substrates are part of advanced packaging innovation toward large transistor-count packages by 2030.", "Sivers/GF collaboration supports optical connectivity architectures including CPO and LPO for data-center interconnects."]
cited_evid

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: Hyperscaler capex has risen sharply and may pressure free cash flow; a social post cites a Nomura-style chart claiming FCF for AMZN/MSFT/GOOG/META/ORCL is nearing zero while S&P 500 is at highs.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Alphabet expected 2026 capex in the $175B-$185B range and said investments are for AI compute, Cloud demand, Services, and Other Bets.", "Meta raised 2026 capex guidance to $125B-$145B, citing higher component pricing and data-center costs.", "ProCap says hyperscaler capex is projected around $660B in 2026 and argues capex now approximates operating cash flow for the group."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: partial_support
source: https://x.com/dongdongRobin/status/2069707476199669926

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: Morgan Stanley was early to call a storage supercycle and remains a persistent NVIDIA bull; a newer report also highlights MLCC.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Micron official results support strong memory demand and operating momentum.", "Micron remarks state DRAM and NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.", "KLA describes AI-chip manufacturing as requiring advanced process control across memory, logic, and packaging."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: insufficient_public_evidence
source: https://x.com/tychozzz/status/2069627784092320071

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: A YouTube creator named Ethan's U.S. stock notes has professional research background and publishes weekly U.S. stock reports that may be useful.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["No auditable source in this pilot verifies the creator's credentials, weekly-report quality, or citation discipline."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: source_discovery_only
source: https://x.com/LucyBuilding/status/2066536111888040081

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: Goldman Sachs reports called storage and MLCC shortages after large price moves, and these reports are useful for paid clients.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Micron says DRAM and NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.", "Micron's record results are consistent with strong memory-cycle fundamentals.", "KLA explains AI chips require advanced process control across memory and packaging."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: insufficient_public_evidence
source: https://x.com/v3wanu/status/2067976057790365875

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: The ZhuLinsen daily_stock_analysis GitHub project is an AI-driven A/HK/US/JP/KR stock watchlist analysis system that can produce daily dashboards and push reports.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["The repository describes an AI-driven stock analysis system for A-shares, Hong Kong, U.S., Japanese, and Korean stocks.", "The English README says the system analyzes watchlists daily, generates a decision dashboard, and pushes to Telegram/Discord/Slack/Email/WeChat Work/Feishu.", "The project site says DSA integrates market data, news sentiment, technicals, fundamentals, and LLMs for individual-stock reports and market recaps."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: supports
source: https://x.com/crypto_oldk/status/206815664047878
